text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 20. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
